name: Ham Quiche
recipeIngredient: A few grains of Cayenne pepper
1/2 lb Cooked ham, cut into thin strips
1 Baked 9-inch pastry shell (in a heat-resistant, non-metallic pie pan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, beat eggs, cream, nutmeg, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper until well mixed.
2. Stir in ham and cheese.
3. Pour the mixture into the baked pastry shell.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes.
5. Move cooked edges toward the center and heat an additional 12 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let stand at room temperature for 3 to 4 minutes to finish cooking.
